title: Chief Financial Officer
summary: The financial leader responsible for capital discipline, liquidity awareness, financial reporting, and sustainable institutional scaling.
biography: This executive seat is available. Neuroartan has defined the Chief Financial Officer role as a real operating standard before appointing a public holder.
The financial leader responsible for capital discipline, liquidity awareness, financial reporting, and sustainable institutional scaling.
The public profile is intentionally role-first until a human executive is hired, verified, and approved for publication.
mandate: Build the financial architecture that keeps Neuroartan ambitious without allowing strategy, hiring, or market movement to outrun real resources.
source_posture: Governed role placeholder for future executive hiring
